description: Infer stable field IDs for a folder by scanning existing automation imports and returning who references each field.

folder_id.description: NetHunt folder identifier. Discover valid values with `list_readable_folders` or `list_writable_folders`.
folder_id.title: Folder Id

kind.description: Optional automation kind filter. Use `null` to list all configured automation kinds.
kind.title: Kind

name: list_automation_field_references
